chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3793 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 01.02.2018. Agha Waqar Ahmed Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w PI S>Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP & POI Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIG DSP Aurengzaib Abbasi SDPO Tando Jam, Insp.Asad Nabi PHQ Hyderabad, ASI Ghulam Shabir P.S.Tando Jam -=-=- Mr. Masood Rasul Babar Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3. Learned Asstt:A.G files comments of respondents No.1,2,4 & 5 which are taken on record copy where of supplied to other side. Through this constitutional petition, the main grievance of the petitioner is that petitioner had registered FIR bearing crime No.168/2017 U/s 452, 342, 34 PPC at police station Tando Jam. According to him, this FIR was registered on 12.12.2017, but since then challan has not been submitted in the court of law. Respondent No.4 who is said to be the Investigating Officer of the case is present and submits that the Investigation is in process and after completing the investigation hopefully the report U/s 173 Cr.P.C would be submitted before the competent court of law on or before 12.2.2018. In view of the statement of the Investigating Officer, the learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition, which is disposed of with direction to the respondents that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in violation of law and Investigating Officer is directed to carryon investigation in accordance with law without any influence.

JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
